title: ATP-OSM Sync
subtitle: Data synchronisation between All The Places and OpenStreetMap

index.summary: This project helps synchronise point-of-interest data from All The Places into OpenStreetMap. It compares first-party brand data with current OSM features to find missing locations, outdated tags and potential improvements.
index.githubLink: Add spiders, report issues and view source

auto.title: Automatic Updates
auto.description: Some updates are being made automatically but some differences need reviewing
auto.stats: {{ x }} places being updated from {{ y }} brands

preview.title: Preview
preview.description: No updates are being made automatically yet but these can be reviewed to see if they are suitable
preview.stats: {{ x }} places in preview from {{ y }} brands

spider.staleDataDesc: The latest ATP run was empty. Showing data from {{ date }} instead.
spider.rejectedDesc: This spider has been rejected from being included in the automatic updates. It may still be useful for other reasons. The following reason was given:
spider.noData404: The latest ATP run for this spider could not be found (404).
spider.noDataEmpty: All recent ATP runs for this spider were empty.
spider.notBrandSpiderDesc: This spider does not have the expected spider:lineage=S_ATP_BRANDS attribute.

josmError.title: JOSM Error
josmError.message: Could not connect to JOSM. Please make sure JOSM is running and Remote Control is enabled in preferences.

mismatch.title: Important Warning
mismatch.message: Some of the data from the spider may be wrong. DO NOT simply update {{ tag }} on all of the objects. Check the history to see who added {{ tag }} and their likely source. If you are not sure then DO NOT MAKE A CHANGE unless you can survey the place.

josmImport.message: This will load and open the unmapped items from ATP into JOSM. This may be useful to match them to existing elements. DO NOT import them, but use conflation and judgement.
